senators.name: Sen. Claire Abramson
senators.nerdReason: Ph.D. Economics from Columbia. Former Federal Reserve economist. Every major bill co-sponsored includes CBO cost analysis and peer-reviewed economic modeling. Chair of Joint Economic Committee.

senators.name: Sen. James Quinto
senators.nerdReason: Former public health commissioner. Cites CDC and WHO data regularly. Authored landmark opioid response bill grounded in NIH addiction research.
education: M.P.H. Columbia Mailman School of Public Health

NY-14.name: Rep. Fatima Okafor
NY-14.nerdReason: M.S. Civil Engineering. Routinely cites infrastructure data from ASCE report cards. Co-authored the Broadband Data Act which mandated FCC evidence-based coverage mapping.
